title: tropidocarpum californicum
intro: Tropidocarpum californicum, also known as California tickseed, is a perennial wildflower native to the western United States. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant has been found to have health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Tropidocarpum californicum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
